# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.

Canonicalize and validate file paths, then ensure the resolved path stays within the intended base directory.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php
// Define the base directory for templates
$baseDir = __DIR__ . '/templates/';

// Get the page parameter from URL
$page = isset($_GET['page']) ? $_GET['page'] : 'index';

// Sanitize and validate the file path
$safePage = filter_var($page, FILTER_SANITIZE_STRING);
$templatePath = $baseDir . $safePage . '.php';

// Check if the template file exists within the base directory
if (file_exists($templatePath) && strpos($templatePath, $baseDir) === 0) {
    include $templatePath;
} else {
    // Handle invalid or non-existent page
    include $baseDir . '404.php';
}
?>
